standard_components.name: fasteners
standard_components.note: V21 matches the current four-screw reference geometry; update generator and BOM together if changing to eight.

relations.name: fixed ring determines absolute orbit pinion spin
hand crank pinion inversely drives cage

design_checks.name: fixed internal ring to orbit pinion pitch
hand crank pinion to cage drive gear pitch
fixed ring and orbit pinion tooth tip clearance
hand crank and cage drive tooth tip clearance
fixed ring plane separated from drive plane
design_checks.message: Drive gear Z25-29 and internal ring Z38-42 are separated by 9 mm.

design_checks.name: orbit pinion support avoids drive plane
design_checks.message: Cage uses split lower and upper orbit support pillars, leaving both the drive gear plane and hand-crank sweep plane open.

design_checks.name: cage drive gear connected to central journal
design_checks.message: A printed drive web connects the cage drive gear hub to the central bearing journal, so hand-crank torque has a physical load path into the cage.

design_checks.name: orbit shaft supports connected to cage body
design_checks.message: Lower and upper orbit shaft supports are tied back to the central journal with bridges, avoiding floating support solids after STEP import.

design_checks.name: 608ZZ actual 8mm bore to cage journal clearance
fixed ring physically seated on base standoffs
design_checks.message: Base standoffs now reach the fixed ring Z38 plane with printed seats, eliminating the previous 2 mm floating support gap.

design_checks.name: hand crank shaft has upper bushing support
design_checks.message: A fixed upper bushing above the crank hub supports the 3 mm hand shaft and reduces gear mesh tilt under manual load.

design_checks.name: axial retainers and spacers represented
design_checks.message: Central bearing tabs, cage spacers, orbit pinion retainers, and hand crank thrust collar are modeled with at least 0.5 mm running gaps.

mechanism_requirements.name: hand crank gear meshes with cage drive gear
fixed ring forces orbit pinion spin

allowed_hardware_fit_pairs.evidence: 608ZZ actual 8mm bore to cage journal clearance

purchased_parts_bom.spec: M3 x 42 mm reference envelope, qty matches current reference geometry

assembly_sequence.operation: Press or drop 608ZZ bearing into base pocket
Insert cage journal through bearing bore and verify free rotation
assembly_sequence.gate: 608ZZ actual 8mm bore to cage journal clearance

assembly_sequence.operation: Fasten fixed internal ring to base standoffs
assembly_sequence.gate: fastener engagement allowed in hardware-context audit

assembly_sequence.operation: Install orbit pinion on cage orbit shaft with retainers/spacers
Install hand crank shaft and retained pinion
Rotate fallback poses and inspect gear visibility

visibility_gate.name: V21 motion visibility gate
visibility_gate.pass_condition: gear mesh motion remains visible with standard hardware/retainers transparent or hidden
